lesson.menu_desc: There is / There are and Weather Vocabulary -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Weather Talk -- There is / There are and Weather Vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Dienane Brandão de Mesquita | Aula 11 -- Weather Talk

listenings.text: Hi, let me tell you about the weather today in my city. This morning there is a lot of sun and the sky is blue. There are only two small clouds. It is hot now, but in the afternoon there is rain. There is also a strong wind near the river. My friends say there is a storm tonight, so I stay at home. I like the sun, but I do not like the storm. Tomorrow there are no clouds and the weather is good again.

Good morning, everyone. Here is the weather forecast for today. In the morning, there is a lot of sun and the sky is clear. There are no clouds and it is very hot. In the afternoon, there are many clouds and there is rain near the city. There is a strong wind in the evening, so please be careful. Tonight, there is a big storm with rain and wind. Tomorrow, the weather is better. There is sun again and there are no storms. Have a nice day.

extra_audio.text: In the morning, there is a lot of sun in the city. Then there are many clouds in the sky. At noon, there is rain near the river. In the afternoon, there is a strong wind. At night, there is a big storm.
